title: Michaelninders Wool Overlay [16x]
body:
# 🛠️ Michaelninders Wool Overlay (1.8/1.8.9) 🛠️

## 🏆 Features:
### 🔥 Custom Textures:
Get a fresh look for wool blocks to enhance your gameplay.
![All Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g96I4vDT/images/f54a71b66ad63fea5b5577e33226c7b50bddc2ef.png)
### 🎨 Sleek Design:
Clean and modern design to make your gameplay more immersive and enjoyable.
### 🚀 Installation:
Just drag and drop the pack into your resource packs folder, and you’re good to go!
## 👁️ Preview:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/J8pitF6XhQc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

🕹️ Take your Bedwars game to the next level with Michaelninders Wool Overlay!
